_description: Five weighting scenarios for the CPS-SEC sensitivity analysis
_methodology: Each scenario defines dimension weights and local weights; global weights are computed as their product

S0_Baseline.label: Baseline (Security Priority)
S0_Baseline.description: The literature-grounded scheme reported in Table 7. Security receives the heaviest allocation (35%).

S1_EqualAll.label: Equal Weights
S1_EqualAll.description: No a-priori prioritization. All dimensions at 25%; all criteria within each dimension share equal local weight.

S2_PerformancePriority.label: Performance Priority
S2_PerformancePriority.description: Performance receives 35% (e.g., for edge-device deployments where computational overhead is critical).

S3_PracticalPriority.label: Practical Priority
S3_PracticalPriority.description: Practical receives 35% (e.g., for industrial deployments where real-world deployment and interoperability dominate).

S4_DesignPriority.label: Design Priority
S4_DesignPriority.description: Design receives 35% (e.g., for XAI-focused research where explainability dominates).
